description: Unit test specifications for the ScrollBar helper class, testing scrollbar visibility, width calculations, and style adjustments on DOM elements during overflow scenarios.

classes.name: ScrollBarHelper
classes.description: A helper class for managing scrollbar visibility and style adjustments during overflow scenarios.

methods.name: isOverflowing
methods.description: Checks if the document body is overflowing its container, indicating scrollbar presence.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Calculates the width of the scrollbar if present.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the scrollbar and adjusts inline styles of fixed, sticky, and body elements accordingly.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Restores inline styles and attributes to their original state after scrollbar adjustments.
